name: looper
description: Map systems, write and clean beads, orchestrate GPT-5.6 work, and research software decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Map systems, write and clean beads, run loops.
interface.longDescription: Looper writes compact GPT-5.6-aware Codex orchestration loops over plans, beads, bounded execution, review/fix passes, and proof. It includes System Mapper for typed current-state maps, Beadwriter for commit-sized execution packets, Bead Cleaner for safe bd backlog cleanup, and Phone-A-SWE for research-backed software decisions. Default code lanes require Matt Pocock Skills for matt-pocock-skills:implement and matt-pocock-skills:code-review.
defaultPrompt: Use System Mapper to map this current system.
Use Looper to write a Codex loop.
Use Beadwriter to decompose this bead.
Use Bead Cleaner to audit and safely prune open beads.
Turn this plan into implementation slices.
Write a loop using Matt Pocock skill lanes.
Use Phone-A-SWE to research this technical decision.
